entry.name: SPLIT_TO_WEB_AND_CUSTOM_REPLACEMENT_TEXT
entry.string: <intent-filter android:autoVerify="true" data-generated="true"> <action android:name="android.intent.action.VIEW" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.BROWSABLE" /> <data android:scheme="https" /> <data android:host="auth" /> <data android:host="northernstepstudio.com" /> <data android:pathPrefix="/apps/nexusbuild" /> <data android:pathPrefix="/callback" /> </intent-filter> <intent-filter data-generated="true"> <action android:name="android.intent.action.VIEW" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.BROWSABLE" /> <data android:scheme="nexusbuild" /> <data android:host="auth" /> <data android:host="northernstepstudio.com" /> <data android:pathPrefix="/apps/nexusbuild" /> <data android:pathPrefix="/callback" /> </intent-filter>
